question: Should we open-source our internal deployment tool?

consensus.summary: Open-source the deployment framework after shipping Cloud beta. Keep ML scoring model proprietary. Requires 2 FTE and 4-month prep.
conditions: Platform layer must represent >50% of KubeDeploy Cloud value
2 FTE secured for community maintenance before launch
KubeDeploy Cloud beta ships before or simultaneously with OSS release
Plugin architecture completed to isolate contribution surface

key_insight: Sequence matters more than the decision. Ship hosted version BEFORE open-sourcing to establish revenue position and neutralize fork risk.

engineer.fatal_flaw_raised: 40% of engineer time consumed by community PRs with insufficient staffing
engineer.resolution: 2 FTE + strict acceptance policy + plugin-only external features

finance.devils_advocate_scenario: Competitor forks and ships hosted version in 2 weeks
finance.resolution: Cloud-first sequencing + proprietary ML scoring model

decision_framework.gate: Value split audit: core vs platform

next_actions: Finance models Cloud pricing with OSS funnel
Revisit decision with audit data in 2 weeks
